description: Design a customer learning program (short tracks, not a real school) tied to a clear warranty experience: what is covered, how to get help, how to self-serve basics. Enable sales to distribute. Measure deflection and satisfaction on real issues.

examples.context: Org revamped warranty story and stood up light customer learning tracks. Sales handed materials. Support saw fewer basics.
examples.resolution: Customers self-served common care steps. Phone time shifted to real issues.

examples.context: Proposal for 40-hour LMS. Team would never finish.
examples.resolution: Three short tracks only. Completion and use higher.

examples.context: Leadership asked if education spend mattered.
examples.resolution: Before/after basics volume plus complex CSAT. Program kept.
